title: Paint Bucket 2D
description: In this resource set, the usual paints have been replaced with 2D buckets of paints. Works with other resource sets!
body:
# Paint Bucket 2D Resource Pack
![All paint bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5aa2e3c2f93219b2146b1ccc3d7597d407f3450.png)
# ![English](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a67aca54d7e243e1f9ad0bde51c03c65fe406c66.png)
Thanks to this resource pack, all dyes replace their usual texture with buckets of paints 

If any crashes/errors occur during use, then be sure to let us know! I would appreciate it.

# ![Русский](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2571a1d94201b723e686d6772b68932498ce5d8f.png)
Благодаря этому ресурспаку все красители заменяют свою обычную текстуру на ведра с красками

Если во время использования возникнут какие-либо сбои/ошибки, то обязательно сообщите! Буду признателен.

#
[![3d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808bb0e892b8109758fb08578de5daaa83e7216b.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/paint-bucket-3d)
